hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'rm[[:space:]]+-[rf]{1,2}[rf]?[[:space:]]+.*(client|server|ai-server|\.env)'; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "소스 디렉토리/환경변수 삭제 감지 — 직접 확인 후 실행하세요"}'; elif echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push.*(--force|-f).*(main|master)'; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "main 브랜치 force push 차단 — 의도한 경우 직접 실행하세요"}'; fi

input=$(cat); f=$(echo "$input" | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); echo "$f" | grep -qiE '/client/src/.*\.(ts|tsx)$' && cd "c:/Users/user/Desktop/Personal/client" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -30 || true

input=$(cat); f=$(echo "$input" | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); echo "$f" | grep -qiE '/client/src/.*\.(ts|tsx)$' && cd "c:/Users/user/Desktop/Personal/client" && npx eslint "$f" --max-warnings=0 2>&1 | tail -15 || true

input=$(cat); f=$(echo "$input" | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); echo "$f" | grep -qiE '/ai-server/.*\.py$' && python -m py_compile "$f" 2>&1 && echo "Python syntax OK" || true
